title: High Molecular Weight Total DNA Extraction from Plant Tissues for Long Read Sequencing
author: Subash Rai
materials: Dislodge the beads by inverting the tubes.
Assess DNA quality in NanoDrop, Qubit, and TapeStation/PFGE

steps.title: Take 10 mL lysis buffer and...
steps.instruction: Take 10 mL lysis buffer and warm it at 60 °C for 15-20 min.

steps.title: Take ~ 1 L of liquid...
steps.instruction: Take ~ 1 L of liquid nitrogen (LN 2 ) in Dewar Flask that requires for chilling mortar and pestle and grinding the tissues.

steps.title: Take dry ice in an esky/insulated container for later steps
steps.instruction: Take dry ice in an esky/insulated container for later steps.

steps.title: Grind 500 mg to 1000 mg...
steps.instruction: Grind 500 mg to 1000 mg healthy young fresh/snap frozen/frozen tissues in mortar and pestle chilled with LN 2 to fine powder. It may require topping up 2-3 times LN 2 while grinding the plant tissues.

steps.title: Keep a 15 ml falcon tube...
steps.instruction: Keep a 15 ml falcon tube on the dry ice for 00:05:00 then swirl the ground powder with LN 2 and pour directly into the falcon tube while keeping the falcon tube on the dry ice.

steps.title: Keep the lid half-opened and let LN 2 to evaporate
steps.instruction: Keep the lid half-opened and let LN 2 to evaporate.

steps.title: Take out the tube and add...
steps.instruction: Take out the tube and add 10 mL prewarmed lysis buffer (at 60 °C ) with freshly added 200 µL β- mercaptoethanol.

steps.title: Mix well by inverting the tubes...
steps.instruction: Mix well by inverting the tubes (~100 times) until the solution become more homogenous. In some sample, solution may not be homogenous but form whiteish clumps (it is normal) and incubate at 60 °C in thermomixer at 300 rpm, °C, for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Add 200 µL Proteinase K (stock...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL Proteinase K (stock conc= 20 mg/mL ) after 15 min of incubation.

steps.title: Mix well by inverting the tube...
steps.instruction: Mix well by inverting the tube (15-20 times) and continue the incubation.

steps.title: Spin the solution at 3000 x...
steps.instruction: Spin the solution at 3000 x g, Room temperature, 5 minutes . If any clump formed during the incubation pellet would be large.

steps.title: Take an equal volume of the...
steps.instruction: Take an equal volume of the supernatant in two fresh 15 ml falcon tubes using P1000 wide bore pipette tips.

steps.title: Add an equal volume of Chloroform:Isoamyl...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of Chloroform:Isoamyl alcohol (24:1) into the solution.

steps.title: Mix the solution by inverting the...
steps.instruction: Mix the solution by inverting the tube until a milky colour appears (~100 times) and centrifuge at 3000 x g, Room temperature, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Transfer the aqueous phase to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the aqueous phase to a new 15ml falcon tube without disturbing interface layer.

steps.title: Add an equal volume of Chloroform:Isoamyl...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of Chloroform:Isoamyl alcohol (24:1) into the solution.

steps.title: Mix the solution by inverting the...
steps.instruction: Mix the solution by inverting the tubes ~100 times and centrifuge at 3000 x g, °C, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Transfer 1 ml aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 1 ml aqueous phase to 2 ml LoBind tube without disturbing the interface layer (much thinner than the first extraction). It requires multiple 2 ml LoBind tube. transferring aqueous phase to 2 ml tube is for making things easy for centrifugation but can be done in a single tube if the centrigugation set up is available for a bigger volume tube.

steps.title: Add half volume of Ammonium acetate (7
steps.instruction: Add half volume of Ammonium acetate (7.5 M). Mix well by inverting the tubes and incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, Room temperature, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, Room temperature, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet with 1 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet with 1 mL 70% ethanol ( freshly prepared ) using a wide bore P1000 pipette tip and transfer all into a 2ml LoBind DNA tube.

steps.title: Rinse the tube with additional 1...
steps.instruction: Rinse the tube with additional 1 mL 70% ethanol to collect remaining CTAB-DNA complex. Perform the same for another 15 ml falcon tube.

steps.title: Incubate 2 ml tubes for 00:05:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate 2 ml tubes for 00:05:00 at Room temperature in a HulaMixer at 9 rpm, °C, .

steps.title: Spin the tube at 13000 x...
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at 13000 x g, °C, 5 minutes and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat washing steps go to step...
steps.instruction: Repeat washing steps go to step #25 & go to step #26 once with 2 mL 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Keep the tubes under fume hood...
steps.instruction: Keep the tubes under fume hood for 00:05:00 to remove any traces of ethanol.

steps.title: Resuspend the DNA pellet in 200...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the DNA pellet in 200 µL of prewarmed ( 60 °C ) High-salt TE buffer .

steps.title: Add 4 µL RNaseA and incubate...
steps.instruction: Add 4 µL RNaseA and incubate at 37 °C for 15-20 min.

steps.title: Add 100 µL ammonium acetate ( 7
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL ammonium acetate ( 7.5 Molarity (M) ) mix well and incubate it for 00:10:00 at Room temperature . Shake it once every 5 min.

steps.title: Spin the tube at 13000 x...
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at 13000 x g, °C, 3 minutes and transfer the supernatant using wide-bore pipette tips into a fresh tube.

steps.title: Add equal volume of binding buffer...
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of binding buffer and mix well by inverting the tube.

steps.title: Add 150 µL beads solution (8-9...
steps.instruction: Add 150 µL beads solution (8-9 million beads) and incubate it for 00:30:00 at Room temperature in a HulaMixture.

steps.title: Place the tube in magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Place the tube in magnetic rack for 2-3 min and remove the supernatant and wash the beads with 500 µL freshly prepared 70% ethanol (clumping of beads may appear but try to dislodge by inverting the tube several times).

steps.title: Wash the pellet once again with...
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet once again with 500 µL freshly prepared 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Add 75 µL prewarmed (at 50...
steps.instruction: Add 75 µL prewarmed (at 50 °C ) 10 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl (elution buffer) pH 8 and incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Place the tube back in the...
steps.instruction: Place the tube back in the magnetic rack and leave it for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Remove the supernatant in the fresh 1
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant in the fresh 1.5ml LoBind DNA tube. If the eluate is very viscus and beads could not pellet either add more elution buffer or centrifuge 13000 x g, °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Take out the tubes from magnetic...
steps.instruction: Take out the tubes from magnetic rack and add 500 µL freshly prepared 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Place the tubes back to the...
steps.instruction: Place the tubes back to the magnetic rack for 2 min and remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant in a fresh...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant in a fresh 2ml LoBind tube and add equal volume of Isopropanol (>98%), mix well, and incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: General Quality check
steps.instruction: General Quality check: QC check in Oxford Nanopore Sequencing: Read length distribution ( estimated N50 = 29.5kb) in MinION Nanopore sequencing. DNA was extracted from frozen leaves sample. The size selection was performed with standard SRE kit (circulomics) prior to the library preparation using ONT LSK109 kit.
